title: Fair Freecam
description: Fork of Freecam without controversial features
body:
## What is this mod?

This is a fork of the [Freecam](https://modrinth.com/mod/freecam) mod, but all controversial features that might be against server rules or counted as cheating have been removed.
## What exactly was removed?

- Flying through blocks in freecam
- Modifying the environment through freecam
- Freezing the player while in freecam
- Interacting with the world through freecam
- Gamma boost in freecam
